TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kalito'od Itiniay i Beinan Cen no Taitung ko Kalito'od a niyaro', 97 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 276 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 251 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 79%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 7%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾito~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ itiniaj i b~b~vəinan ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kaɾito~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kalito'od Itiniay i Beinan Cen no Taitung ko Kalito'od a niyaro', 97 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 276 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 251 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 79%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 7%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾito~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ itiniaj i b~b~vəinan ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kaɾito~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
